---
title: "Data analysis of your dataset"
author: 
  - name: "Grupo 3 (Malawi): Juliana Oliveira, Pedro H. de Araujo e Vitória Murakami"
    affiliation:
      - name: Graduate Program in Genetics and Plant Breeding, Department of Genetics, ESALQ-USP
        city: Piracicaba, São Paulo, Brazil
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true  # Imagens e scripts dentro do próprio HTML 
    toc: true              # Sumário?
    toc-location: left     # Local do sumário
    code-overflow: wrap    # Não deixa o código passar a margem
    fig-align: center      # Centraliza no HTML
    fig-width: 10          # Aumenta a largura padrão no HTML
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px # Tamanho da barra lateral
      body-width: 1000px   # Tamanho do corpo do arquivo
      margin-width: 250px  # Tamanho da margem
      gutter-width: 1.5rem # Espaçamento entre os elementos acima
  pdf:
    fig-align: center      # Centraliza as imagens
    fig-pos: 'H'           # Força a figura a ficar "Aqui"
    include-in-header:     # Não deixa o código passar a margem
      text: |
        \usepackage{fvextra}
        \usepackage{float}
        \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
execute:
  fig-width: 8             # Largura padrão global
  fig-height: 6            # Altura padrão global
---

#Produtividade

```{R}
library(dplyr)

data = read.csv2("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mauricioaraujj/Pan_African_Trials_Network/refs/heads/main/data/data.csv")
data <- subset(data, COUNTRY == "Malawi")

data <- data %>%    mutate(
  env = as.factor(env),
  gen = as.factor(gen),
  bloco = as.factor(rep),
  check = as.factor(check),
  SEASON= as.factor(SEASON),
  YEAR= as.factor(YEAR),
  loc = as.factor(loc),
  RAINFED = as.factor(RAINFED),
  
  GY = as.numeric(GY),
  PH_R8 = as.numeric(PH_R8)
)

library(asreml)

asreml.options(workspace = '1gb', pworkspace = '2gb')
#testando efeitos fixos
mfGY <-  asreml(
  fixed  = GY ~ env + bloco:env + check,
  rcov   = ~ units,
  data   = data
)
wald(mfGY)
plot(mfGY)

#testing for randomm efects
#gen
m0GY <-  asreml(
  fixed  = GY ~ env + bloco:env,
  random = ~ gen,
  data   = data)

lrt(m0GY, mfGY)
plot(m0GY)

#gxe interaction

m1GY <- asreml(
  fixed  = GY ~ env + bloco:env,
  random = ~ gen + gen:env,
  data   = data
)

lrt(m0GY, m1GY)

plot(m1GY)
```

```{R}
#variance componentes
summary(mfGY)$varcomp
summary(m0GY)$varcomp
summary(m1GY)$varcomp

```

```{R}
summary(m0GY)
summary(m1GY)

#| tbl-cap: "m0"
vpredict(m0GY,  H2 ~ V1/(V1+V2))
#| tbl-cap: "m1"
vpredict(m1GY,  H2 ~ V1/(V1+V2))

```

```{R ERRO}
library(GGally)
blues_mf <- predict(mfGY, classify = 'env')
blups_m0 <- predict(m0GY, classify = "gen")
blups_m1 <- predict(m1GY, classify = "gen")
blups_m1_gxe <- predict(m1GY, classify = "gen:env")

table(blups_m0$pvals$status)
table(blups_m1$pvals$status)


aux = cbind(blups_m0$pvals[,2], blups_m1$pvals[,2])

colnames(aux) = c("m0", "m1")

GGally::ggpairs(
  data = as.data.frame(aux[,-1])
) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
```

#Altura de Planta

```{R}
library(asreml)
asreml.options(workspace = '1gb', pworkspace = '2gb')
#fix efffects
mfPH <- asreml(
  fixed = PH_R8 ~ env + bloco:env + check,
  rcov  = ~ units,
  data  = data
)

#wald test
wald(mfPH)
plot(mfPH)

#random effects
# efeito de genótipo
m0PH <- asreml(
  fixed  = PH_R8 ~ env + bloco:env,
  random = ~ gen,
  data   = data
)
plot(m0PH)

# interação GxE
m1PH <- asreml(
  fixed  = PH_R8 ~ env + bloco:env,
  random = ~ gen + gen:env,
  data   = data
)
plot(m1PH)
lrt(m0PH, m1PH)
```
``` {R}
#componentes de variância
summary(mfPH)$varcomp
summary(m0PH)$varcomp
summary(m1PH)$varcomp
``` 

```{R}
#Heritability
# herdabilidade modelo m0
vpredict(m0PH, H2 ~ V1/(V1+V2))

# herdabilidade modelo m1
vpredict(m1PH, H2 ~ V1/(V1+V2))
```

``` {R}

library(GGally)

blues_mfPH <- predict(mfPH, classify = "env")

blups_m0PH <- predict(m0PH, classify = "gen")

blups_m1PH <- predict(m1PH, classify = "gen")

blups_m1PH_gxe <- predict(m1PH, classify = "gen:env")

table(blups_m0PH$pvals$status)
table(blups_m1PH$pvals$status)
table(blups_m1PH_gxe$pvals$status)


aux <- cbind(
  blups_m0PH$pvals[,2],
  blups_m1PH$pvals[,2]
)

colnames(aux) <- c("m0", "m1")

GGally::ggpairs(
  data = as.data.frame(aux)
) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
```
